title: Generating a Trie Node
scenario: Write a function that generates a node for a Trie data structure. The input will be a character and a value, as well as a reference to the parent node. The function should return a node with the given character and value, and the correct number of child nodes. The node should be implemented using a dictionary to store the child nodes.
constraints: Must include a check to ensure the character is not already in the node
Must return a dictionary representing the node

evaluationCriteria.description: The function implements the correct Trie logic to create a node.
The returned node has the correct structure and contains the given character-value pair.
The code adheres to standard Python syntax and formatting.
The function is implemented efficiently and uses the optimal number of operations.
